bonus_for_your_PH_lineup.sinister_cli_umbrella: Built tools/sinister-cli/ this turn — `sinister term <op>` dispatches to your `term.__main__:run`. Once you rename your built-in `sterm` to `sinister term` (Image #7), the umbrella picks it up free.
bonus_for_your_PH_lineup.sinister_swarm: Built tools/sinister-swarm/ this turn — `from sinister_swarm import dm, broadcast, list_active`. Your /inbox + /cross-agent + /ask + /progress + /dm + /broadcast builtins can call this instead of hand-rolling JSON file writes. Saves you ~50 LOC + you get a real test fixture.
bonus_for_your_PH_lineup.memory_graph_render: tools/memory-graph-render/ also shipped earlier — `memory-graph-render --namespace term --output ./term.png` if you ever want to viz Term's interactive history.
